title: WV14 7DX, Salisbury Poultry (Midlands) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/MP3128SG/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Salisbury Poultry (Midlands) Limited   Installation name: Salisbury Poultry, Salisbury House   Permit number: EPR/MP3128SG/A001   "
